report.summary: Cycle 2 close Apr 3: 4 agents ran since last EOD (build×1, design×1, community×1, standup×1) producing 2 new learn guides (Berachain PoL + Crypto DCA). 2 untracked pages (Drift hack + Polkadot staking) have metadata but NO structured data. 40 uncommitted files (up from 25 at cycle 1). 6/6 API routes on disk with cache TTLs, 0/6 with rate limiting, 1/6 with fallback data. Deploy debt at 13th consecutive escalation.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: DELTA: 2 new learn guides scaffolded this cycle (Berachain PoL + Crypto DCA) via build-v2 — files were written to Degen0x workspace but NOT to cryptodegen git repo. These pages exist only in the build report, not on disk in src/app/learn/.

2 untracked pages on disk (Drift Protocol $285M Hack, Polkadot Staking Halving): both have valid Metadata exports with title, description, keywords, openGraph. Neither has JSON-LD structured data (0 application/ld+json scripts) — needs SEO pass before publish.
No 'use client' conflicts detected on either new untracked page — both correctly export metadata from server components.
Published slugs: 310 learn + 89 tools = ~399 slugs in published-pages.ts (1023 lines). 311 learn dirs + 115 tool dirs on disk. Gap between published slugs and actual pages persists.
Cannot verify live page HTTP status (sandbox blocks degen0x.com). Last known production commit: e3f63fc.
No new build errors detected — last build report (build-v2) shows both Berachain and DCA guides passed scaffolding.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present on disk: prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields

Cache TTLs verified: prices (60s/revalidate 120s), fear-greed (600s/1200s), trending (300s/600s), market-metrics (60s/120s), market-dominance (300s/600s), defi-yields (dynamic — no explicit TTL constant)
Stale-while-revalidate pattern: 5/6 routes have explicit revalidation windows. defi-yields uses dynamic caching.

FALLBACK_DATA coverage: only market-dominance (2 references). prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields all have 0 FALLBACK references — risk of error responses if both cache and upstream API fail.
Rate limiting: 0/6 public API routes use checkRateLimit(). Only /api/health has rate limiting. All public routes are unprotected against abuse.
Cannot verify upstream API health (CoinGecko, DefiLlama, alternative.me) — sandbox egress blocked to degen0x.com.

sections.title: DevOps
items: Production commit: e3f63fc (feat: 4 new learn guides, 8 OG images, stablecoin yield tracker, published pages update)
Uncommitted files: 40 total (5 modified + 35 untracked) — up from 25 at last EOD cycle 1. Growth of 15 files in ~3 hours.
Modified files: package-lock.json, community report, portfolio-rebalancing page, StablecoinYieldTracker.tsx, published-pages.ts
Key untracked: 2 new learn pages (Drift hack + Polkadot staking), 2 OG SVGs, 2 social cards, 18+ report files, social drafts
Cannot verify Vercel deployment status — sandbox blocks vercel.com. Recommend browser check at vercel.com/0x-machina/cryptodegen/deployments.
Deploy debt: 13th consecutive escalation. All work since e3f63fc is invisible to Google and users.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Shipped this cycle: 2 new learn guides researched and written (Berachain PoL 463 lines + Crypto DCA 518 lines) with full SEO, FAQ schemas, page data files — but written to Degen0x workspace, not yet in git repo.
Also this cycle: Design audit produced UX polish + 2 OG images (IL + Hyperliquid). Community produced 5 tweets (#410-414), newsletter v35, 2 social cards. Standup v4 ran with full analytics.
Carry-over (growing): 40 uncommitted files in git repo. 2 new untracked learn pages need structured data before publish. Berachain + DCA pages need to be moved to cryptodegen repo.
Content totals: 311 learn page dirs + 115 tool page dirs = 426 on disk. ~399 published slugs.
BLOCKER for Jefe (P0): Commit + deploy the 40 uncommitted files. This is a single action that unblocks all accumulated SEO value. 13th consecutive escalation.
P1: Add structured data to Drift Protocol and Polkadot Staking pages before next publish batch.
P2: Add FALLBACK_DATA to prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields routes (5/6 missing).
P3: Add checkRateLimit() to all 6 public API routes (0/6 protected).
